name: @chbrain/khai-engine-desire
description: khai engine content, the desire domain: desire as position, the resting style of wanting a persona brings toward an object of desire, before any particular person fills it.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Desire as position: the resting style of wanting a persona brings toward an object of desire -- the appetite before its face -- across the six love styles a persona may carry.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_desire.md) declares desire as a resting style of wanting the persona carries toward an object of desire (a baseline shape the longing takes before any particular person fills it), and the system-wide law makes every persona carry it beneath who they reach for.
card.issue: Six ready expressions a persona may hold, the six love styles after Lee: passionate (eros, wanting on sight), playful (ludus, wanting as a game), companionate (storge, wanting grown from liking), pragmatic (pragma, wanting by fit), obsessive (mania, wanting that consumes), and selfless (agape, wanting that gives itself away). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets a baseline that colours every reaching, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('personas carry a desire style'), so the baseline holds system-wide and no persona meets a wanted other on neutral ground. Two, the link: each persona carries its style under Projection. A persona may also hold a different, even contradicting, style under Shadow; the gap between the wanting shown and the wanting masked is the character, not a contradiction to reject.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona carries a desire style under Projection. Whether a Projection style and a Shadow style cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its desire style under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where a persona masks a different style, put it under Shadow. Read it in who registers as worth reaching for and how; the room reads it beneath the pursuit, never narrates it.
